title: Cubic Carts
description: Implements Redstone level sensitive copper rails and changes minecraft velocity math to be configurable, similar to how cubicmetre suggested in their video
body:
Adds changes proposed in [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=klsGsPY-Q9k](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=klsGsPY-Q9k)
- includes copper rail (redstone level sensitive, 1 level = 0.1 blocks/tick)
- removal of max speed gamerule
- made drag apply exponentially
- the values are configurable in config/cubiccarts.json on the server. the drag calculation uses EvalEx to be evaulated at runtime, the config has a file watcher and updates on filesave
